cases.prompt: 이 사이트 접근성 점검해줘. WCAG 맞춰주고 키보드 네비게이션도 확인해줘.

assertions.text: Runs axe-core (npx @axe-core/cli) and Lighthouse accessibility scans against the target URL.
Performs WCAG 2.2 AA manual checks automated tools miss: contrast 4.5:1/3:1, target size 24px, focus-visible, keyboard nav.
Produces a WCAG 2.2 AA report (a11y-report.html) grouping violations by severity with file:selector and before to after fixes.

cases.prompt: Run an a11y audit on our login page, the focus ring isn't visible and screen reader users are stuck.

assertions.text: Flags the missing focus indicator as SC 2.4.7 and recommends :focus-visible instead of outline:none.
Includes screen-reader sanity checks (NVDA/VoiceOver/TalkBack) and a manual keyboard-only flow test.
Notes automated tools catch only ~30-40 percent so manual gates are required before passing.
